revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 19 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月19日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 19일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 19 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十九]][[zh:二月十九]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 19|qq=February 19}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 19일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 19''' is the 19th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tennan (Japan)|ja|天安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tennan (Japan)|1=Cheonan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3577288}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|857|en|857|qid=Q30374|lt=857|1=857}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yoshifusa|en|Fujiwara no Yoshifusa|qid=Q960841|lt=Fujiwara Yoshifusa|1=Fujiwara no Yoshifusa}} was appointed as {{ill|Minister (government)|en|Minister (government)|qid=Q83307|lt=Daijō-daijin|1=Minister (government)}}; he became the first commoner (人臣) to hold that office. {{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|qid=Q1194415|lt=Bunchi|1=Bunji (era)}} 1st year / {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1185|en|1185|qid=Q19729|lt=1185|1=1185}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – During the {{ill|Battle of Yashima|en|Battle of Yashima|qid=Q2117322|lt=Battle of Yashima|1=Battle of Yashima}}, after being defeated at the {{ill|Battle of Ichi-no-Tani|en|Battle of Ichi-no-Tani|qid=Q2116658|lt=Battle of Ichinotani|1=Battle of Ichi-no-Tani}}, the Taira forces fled to Yashima, where they were ambushed by {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|en|Minamoto no Yoshitsune|qid=Q310445|lt=Minamoto no Yoshitsune|1=Minamoto no Yoshitsune}}; in the ensuing battle, {{ill|Nasu no Yoichi|en|Nasu no Yoichi|qid=Q2625800|lt=Nasu Yoichi|1=Nasu no Yoichi}} famously shot down the target on a ship's fan. * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1790|en|1790|qid=Q7775|lt=1790|1=1790}} {{ill|April 3|en|April 3|qid=Q2509|lt=April 3|1=April 3}}) – At the mouth of the Sumida River in Edo, a shelter for the homeless was established called the {{ill|Kayakata Hito Ashiyori-ba|ja|加役方人足寄場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kayakata Hito Ashiyori-ba|1=Kayakata Hito Ashiyori-ba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11398626}}. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – During the uprising led by {{ill|Ōshio Heihachirō|en|Ōshio Heihachirō|qid=Q1056715|lt=Ōshi Heihachirō|1=Ōshio Heihachirō}}, known as the {{ill|Ōshi Heihachirō Rebellion|ja|大塩平八郎の乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōshi Heihachirō Rebellion|1=Rebellion of Ōshio Heihachirō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q4126363}}, a group of about 100 former retainers of the Edo machi-bugyō rose up at Tenpō; they fought against the bakufu forces. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – The edict for the Xinyou Revolution (【辛酉】) was issued, changing the era name from {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} to {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – Approximately one thousand former retainers of the bakufu, calling for uncompromising resistance against the imperial army, formed the {{ill|Shōgitai|en|Shōgitai|qid=Q710107|lt=Shōgitai|1=Shōgitai}} at Ueno Kan'ei-ji. == Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Ii Naomasa|en|Ii Naomasa|qid=Q1334437|lt=Ii Naomasa|1=Ii Naomasa}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}) and one of the {{ill|Shitennō (Tokugawa clan)|en|Shitennō (Tokugawa clan)|qid=Q1040806|lt=Tokugawa Yotsutennō|1=Shitennō (Tokugawa clan)}} (died {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunka|1=Bunkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|qid=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|qid=Q2460|lt=March 30|1=March 30}}) – {{ill|Manabe Akikatsu|en|Manabe Akikatsu|qid=Q3285148|lt=Manabe Senshō|1=Manabe Akikatsu}}, a member of the {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} and the 7th daimyō of the Echizen Sabae Domain (died {{ill|1884|en|1884|qid=Q7819|lt=1884|1=1884}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1821|en|1821|qid=Q6976|lt=1821|1=1821}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – The first head of the 【Hanayagi-juusuke】 school, a renowned Japanese dancer and the progenitor of the Hanayagi style (died {{ill|1903|en|1903|qid=Q2045|lt=1903|1=1903}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa Taruhito|en|Prince Arisugawa Taruhito|qid=Q668338|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya Tsuchihito Shinnō|1=Prince Arisugawa Taruhito}}, an imperial prince and the commander of the eastern expedition during the Boshin War (died {{ill|1895|en|1895|qid=Q7844|lt=1895|1=1895}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Qianxing (Song)|ja|乾興|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianxing (Song)|1=Qianxing (Song)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11370675}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1022|en|1022|qid=Q19261|lt=1022|1=1022}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – The 3rd emperor of the Song dynasty, {{ill|Emperor Zhenzong of Song|ja|真宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Zhenzong of Song|1=Emperor Zhenzong of Song|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1206607}} (born {{ill|968|en|968|qid=Q23918|lt=968|1=968}}). * {{ill|Chōkan|en|Chōkan|qid=Q1193904|lt=Chōkan|1=Chōkan}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} {{ill|March 13|en|March 13|qid=Q2400|lt=March 13|1=March 13}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadamichi|en|Fujiwara no Tadamichi|qid=Q1354407|lt=Fujiwara Tadamichi|1=Fujiwara no Tadamichi}}, who served as a regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}}) (born {{ill|1097|en|1097|qid=Q19488|lt=1097|1=1097}}). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – {{ill|Yoshida Kanetomo|en|Yoshida Kanetomo|qid=Q723266|lt=Yoshida Kanetsugu|1=Yoshida Kanetomo}}, a Shintōist and the founder of the Yoshida Shintō tradition (born {{ill|1435|en|1435|qid=Q6362|lt=1435|1=1435}}). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1704|en|1704|qid=Q6824|lt=1704|1=1704}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō I|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō I|qid=Q5986158|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō (founder)|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō I}}, a kabuki actor (born {{ill|1660|en|1660|qid=Q7001|lt=1660|1=1660}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|18|2|20|1|19|3|2|0219|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
